title: Scheduled Agent
description: Run wiki reorganize jobs manually or from cron schedules. Decisions still land in review unless auto-apply is enabled.
restrictedDescription: Only workspace owners and admins can manage scheduled agent runs.

disabled.title: Scheduled Agent is off
disabled.description: Enable it in AI Settings before creating cron schedules or manual reorganize runs.

tasks.title: Cron Tasks
tasks.description: Workspace-level schedules that target selected pages and optional descendants.
tasks.name: Name

runs.title: Immediate Runs and Recent History
runs.description: Manual and cron-triggered scheduled agent runs.

manualRun.title: Run Scheduled Agent Once
manualRun.description: Select target pages and queue one reorganize run.

folderRun.title: Reorganize {{folderName}}
folderRun.description: The current folder's direct pages and child-folder pages will seed the scheduled agent.
folderRun.tooManyPages: {{count}} pages were found, above the per-run limit of {{max}}. Open a smaller child folder and try again.

forms.instructionPlaceholder: Deduplicate repeated sections, normalize headings, and keep reviewer-facing changes small.

pagePicker.largeSelectionWarning: {{count}} pages selected. Consider narrowing the target set for a clearer review queue.

taskForm.description: Cron syntax is checked lightly here and validated by the server before registration.
taskForm.name: Name

errors.save: Could not save the scheduled task.

deleteTask.title: Delete scheduled task
deleteTask.message: Delete '{{name}}'? The repeatable queue registration will be removed.

trace.title: Scheduled Run Trace
trace.missingRun: Run not found in the recent history.
trace.waitingForAgentRun: The worker has not attached an agent trace yet.
trace.loadFailed: Could not load the agent trace.

errors.updateTask: Could not update the scheduled task.
errors.deleteTask: Could not delete the scheduled task.
errors.queueRunFailed: Could not queue the scheduled run.
errors.noTargetPages: Select at least one target page.
errors.tooManyPages: {{count}} pages exceeds the per-run limit of {{max}}.
